concept: This puzzle game challenges players to drag and drop various-shaped blocks onto a 9x9 grid, aiming to complete full rows or columns which then clear from the board. Blocks are presented in sets of three, and players must place all before new ones appear, with the game ending when no more blocks can be placed. Scoring is based on cleared lines, with bonus points for clearing multiple lines simultaneously or in consecutive turns.
name: Sand Blast! Block Puzzle
